rationale: Run 2.58 made product content visible but kept too much QA and trace material on the public slide surface. Run 2.59 separates persuasive public composition from inspectable trace evidence.

public_slide_surface.purpose: public demo deck and video-facing explanation
public_slide_surface.visual_requirement: one dominant read path, bounded visible word count, no title collision, no overflow, no repeated equal-card layout across adjacent slides

trace_viewer_surface.purpose: reviewer-facing proof in HTML viewer, result docs, and trace manifest
trace_viewer_surface.visual_requirement: dense inspection is allowed in viewer, not on public slides
